title: Kassy's Remodeled Mobs
description: A Resource Pack that adds more details for some vanilla mobs.
body:
A Resource Pack that adds more datails for some vanilla mobs.

Requires Optfine or EMF and ETF
- [EMF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features)
- [ETF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric)

Current Mobs:
Chicken (all variants)
Sheep
Pig (all variants)
Cow (all variants)
Creeper
Spider
Cave Spider
Squid
Glow Squid
Zombies (9 Variants)
Husks (2 Variants)
 
Obs: For the random variants to work, you need to enable the random entity option in Optifine or ETF settings.
